dimensions.name: Governance Awareness

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The 'conversation-to-aw' step successfully mapped conversational inputs to architectural constructs while maintaining schema integrity, implying effective resolution of trade-offs between user intent and system constraints.
